meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Scale Your Freelance SaaS Projects
content.seo_description: Break through the 'basic app' ceiling. Learn how to Claude Code skills setup to accelerate development, impress clients, and ship enterprise-grade code faster.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'basic app' plateau, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and complex logic generation. By configuring custom skill sets, you transform your CLI into an autonomous engineering partner, allowing you to ship production-ready, scalable features in hours rather than days. Master this workflow to scale your freelance output.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the project starts with high-velocity excitement, but soon you’re drowning in repetitive boilerplate, debugging minor inconsistencies, and feeling stuck in a loop of 'basic' app architecture. The gap between a functional prototype and a client-ready, scalable SaaS is widening, and your billable hours are being eaten by syntax errors rather than strategic value.

It’s time to stop coding like it’s 2015. By leveraging Claude Code skills, you shift from being a manual laborer to an AI-orchestrated lead architect. This setup isn't just about speed; it’s about weaponizing your workflow to deliver high-impact, professional-grade code that makes your clients wonder how you finished their roadmap a week ahead of schedule.

steps.title: Environment Audit & Initialization
steps.description: Establish a clean baseline to prevent legacy debt. You need to ensure your local environment is ready for deep AI integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project architecture and identify 3 architectural bottlenecks preventing scalability.

steps.title: Defining Custom Skill Schemas
steps.description: Create reusable skill definitions so Claude Code knows your preferred tech stack (e.g., Next.js, Supabase, Tailwind).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular skill schema for a standard SaaS CRUD implementation using TypeScript and Zod validation.

steps.title: Context Loading & Knowledge Injection
steps.description: Feed your project documentation into the Claude context window to ensure the AI follows your specific coding standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the core design patterns from my docs into a concise context file for Claude Code.

steps.title: Automated Feature Implementation
steps.description: Use your custom skills to build robust features while the AI handles the heavy lifting of state management and error handling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a high-performance, resilient API route for user authentication using the established skill schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement auth route using saas-engine skills'

steps.title: Refinement & Production Hardening
steps.description: Use Claude Code to audit your own work, catching edge cases and security vulnerabilities before the client sees them.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security audit on the latest commit and suggest 3 performance optimizations.

pro_tips: Always define a 'persona' in your Claude config to force the AI to adopt a 'Senior Staff Engineer' tone for code reviews.
Use Antigravity to generate unit tests *before* you prompt Claude to write the implementation for TDD-style accuracy.
Keep your skill files under 500 lines to ensure the LLM doesn't lose focus or hallucinate during complex tasks.
Map your most repetitive client tasks to single-word CLI aliases in your shell profile for instant command execution.
Periodically clear the Claude history context to prevent 'drift' where the AI starts repeating previous mistakes.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project's technical debt using the Antigravity prompt provided in Step 1, then migrate your most frequent boilerplate patterns into a structured YAML skill file.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact blueprint to bypass the junior developer trap and start shipping like a seasoned pro. Stop guessing and start scaling your freelance business with AI precision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
